chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.383 of 2023 Ishrat Niaz Ahmed Lari Versus Ather Yar Khan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 4587/23 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA 4588/23 Dated: 12.12.2023 Mr. S. Zulfiqar Haider Shah for appellant. -.-.- In this appeal appellant has impugned an order of 22.10.2023 passed on an application under section 152 CPC (CMA No.19345/2022) in Suit No.1674 of 2020. It is prayed that in the order dated 15.12.2022 the word “consent” be deleted. Perusal of impugned order reveals that learned Single Judge while disposing of an application under section 152 CPC has provided reason that the appellant/plaintiff had no choice in view of order of the Supreme Court and hence it was not a typographical error; it was a conscious order dictated/passed by learned Single Judge and consequently application was dismissed. The appeal as such has no merit as there appears to be no typographical error in the order referred above. Consequently the same is dismissed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
